headline: Everest Group Q4 Shows Reinsurance Strength Insurance Challenges And Dividend Appeal
summary: Everest Group (NYSE:EG) reported a mixed fourth quarter of 2025, with contrasting results across its Reinsurance and Insurance segments. The Reinsurance business delivered stronger profitability, while the Insurance segment recorded underwriting losses and declining premiums. The company reported an improved combined ratio and returned to profitability year on year, supported by solid investment returns and lower catastrophe losses. Everest Group confirmed a new dividend, reinforcing its...

headline: Is Everest Group (EG) Offering An Opportunity After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Everest Group is currently priced attractively, this article will walk you through what the numbers suggest about its value. The stock last closed at US$328.05, with returns of a 3.4% decline over 7 days, a 0.1% decline over 30 days, a 1.9% decline year to date, a 6.0% decline over 1 year, a 0.8% return over 3 years and 42.8% over 5 years. This mixed share price record has kept Everest Group on many investors' watchlists, as it suggests changing sentiment over...
